ek=function(lh) local li,lj,lk,ll,lm,ln,lo,lp,lq,lr,ls,lt,lu,lv,lw,lx,ly,lz,ma,mb,mc,md,me,mf lj={} nb=1830 end end end end end end en=function(ur,us) local ut,uu,uv,uw,ux,uy,uz,va,vb,vc,vd,ve,vf,vg,vh uu={} uy={-28344,-46309,-12784,-4698,-14614,-30079,-38624,-46326,-36779,-35757,-59956,-19109,-40254,-63439,-42830,244} uv=function(vi) local vj=uy[vi] local vk=(vi*1165)%4096 local vl=((vj+vk)-2500)+ux uu[vi*131071+ux]=vl return vl end uw=0 ut=uw ux=uw ux=ux*8+(45134) ut=ut+(uu[15*131071+ux] or uv(15)) while true do if ut>798 then if ut==804 then uz=va;ux=ux*15+(-634524) uw=ut+(uu[11*131071+ux] or ut==850 then ur[1]=us;ux=ux*10+(-106622) ut=ut+(uu[8*131071+ux] or uv(8)) elseif ut==854 then if ur[va]==us then ux=ux*16+(-592915) ut=ut+(uu[2*131071+ux] or uv(2)) else ux=ux*6+(-228045) end end)(error,next,string.match,tonumber,string.gsub,string.sub,table.insert,string.char,string.byte,coroutine.yield,coroutine.wrap,string.rep,table.concat,math.floor,select,(getfenv or function() local elp,elq,elr,els,elt elq={} elr=function(elu,elv,elw) local elx=((elu+elv)-elw)+elt elq[elu*131071+elt]=elx return elx end els=0 elp=els elt=els elt=elt*30+(64147) elp=elp+(elq[440149*131071+elt] or elr(440149,613,970)) while true do if elp<=452424 then if elp==452424 then break else elt=0 elp=503957 end else if elp==503957 then els=elq[elt*131071+54] or elp elp=els[12867] elseif elp==503939 then return _ENV;else elt=0 elp=503957 end end end end),setmetatable,next,(table.unpack or unpack),nil,math.min,(function(ely) local elz,ema,emb,emc,emd,eme,emf ema={} eme={-64337,-27447,-7421,-37292,-62127,-18489,-17252,-36051,-53101,-62766,-65301,-31582,-4739,-64789,-37588,-65793,-38678,-28609,-1781} emb=function(emg) local emh=eme[emg] local emi=(emg*2555)%4096 local emj=((emh+emi)-1708)+emd ema[emg*131071+emd]=emj return emj end emc=0 elz=emc emd=emc emd=emd*11+(30212) emc=elz+(ema[18*131071+emd] or emb(18)) elz=emc while elz~=895 do if elz>=967 then if elz<1001 then if elz>=967 then if elz<=987 then if elz>=982 then if elz==982 then return false elseif elz==987 then return true else emd=0 elz=1001 end else if elz>=977 then if elz==977 then return false else emd=0 elz=1001 end else if elz==972 then return false elseif elz==967 then return true else emd=0 elz=1001 end end end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else if elz>=1001 then if elz<=1001 then if elz==1001 then emc=ema[emd*131071+47] or elz elz=emc[2945] else emd=0 elz=1001 end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else emd=0 elz=1001 end end else if elz>=797 then if elz>=797 then if elz<=829 then if elz>=813 then if elz<821 then if elz==813 then if ely%emf==0 or ely%(emf+2)==0 then emd=emd*3+(-57030) elz=elz+(ema[4*131071+emd] or emb(4)) else emd=emd*4+(-62292) elz=elz+(ema[5*131071+emd] or emb(5)) end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else if elz==821 then if ely%2==0 or ely%3==0 then emd=emd*14+(-44205) elz=elz+(ema[8*131071+emd] or emb(8)) else emd=emd*28+(-103858) elz=elz+(ema[9*131071+emd] or emb(9)) end elseif elz==829 then if ely<=1 then emd=emd*18+(-526508) elz=elz+(ema[6*131071+emd] or emb(6)) else emd=emd*30+(-888925) elz=elz+(ema[7*131071+emd] or emb(7)) end else emd=0 elz=1001 end end else if elz==805 then if ely<=3 then emd=emd*31+(-512162) elz=elz+(ema[2*131071+emd] or emb(2)) else emd=emd*30+(-517474) emc=elz+(ema[3*131071+emd] or emb(3)) elz=emc end elseif elz==797 then emf=5 emd=emd*18+(-903018) elz=elz+(ema[17*131071+emd] or emb(17)) else emd=0 elz=1001 end end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else if elz>=721 then if elz<=728 then if elz==721 then emf=emf+6 emd=emd*25+(-1543558) elz=elz+(ema[15*131071+emd] or emb(15)) elseif elz==728 then if emf*emf<=ely then emd=emd*4+(-119981) elz=elz+(ema[12*131071+emd] or emb(12)) else emd=emd*4+(-145129) emc=elz+(ema[13*131071+emd] or emb(13)) elz=emc end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else emd=0 elz=1001 end else emd=0 elz=1001 end end end end end),string.len,table.remove,table.sort,(string.unpack),string.gmatch,string.find,string.reverse,tostring,math.abs,rawget,string.format,...);
